title: rubus sueviacus
intro: Rubus sueviacus, also known as the Native Raspberry or Sueviacus Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, inflammation, and wounds due to its astringent and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus sueviacus include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive problems, and support skin health. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
